title: RoasterDB — Specialty Coffee Dataset (Sample)
subtitle: 100 specialty coffees from 72 roasters, mapped to the SCA Flavor Wheel
description:
# RoasterDB — Specialty Coffee Dataset (Free Sample)

A structured dataset of **specialty-coffee products** scraped from the direct storefronts of curated artisan roasters worldwide, with tasting notes normalized to the **Specialty Coffee Association (SCA) Flavor Wheel** and a **source URL on every record** so any fact can be re-verified.

This Kaggle dataset is the **free 100-row sample** (72 roasters). The full dataset — **8,000+ products from 280+ roasters across 20+ countries**, with **11,000+ SCA flavor mappings** — is available at [roasterdb.net](https://specialty-coffee-roasterdb.pages.dev).

## What makes it useful

- **SCA flavor mapping** — free-text tasting notes normalized to the SCA 3-tier wheel (`Category > Subcategory > Descriptor`), e.g. `Fruity > Berry > Blueberry`.
- **Provenance on every row** — `source_url` + `retrieved_at` let you trace and re-verify each record against the original listing.
- **Sanitized pricing** — retail prices cleaned to a plausible band ($3–$150 USD).
- **Honest, uneven coverage** — storefronts don't all publish farm-level data, so origin/altitude/process are partial. Use `quality_flag = good` for the verified tier.

## Field coverage (full dataset)

| Field | Coverage | | Field | Coverage |
| :--- | ---: | --- | :--- | ---: |
| Title / product ID | 100% | | Process method | 45% |
| Weight | 100% | | Roast level | 32% |
| Price (sanitized) | 88% | | Varietals | 30% |
| Origin country | 58% | | Origin region | 20% |
| ≥1 SCA flavor node | 55% | | Altitude | 17% |

## Columns

See the column descriptions tab — every field is documented. A starter notebook demonstrating loading, tabular preview, flavor analysis, and price distribution is attached.

## Use cases

- Coffee subscription & recommendation apps
- Flavor-based search / discovery on the SCA graph
- ML / RAG corpora over specialty coffee
- Market & assortment research across roasters, origins, and price bands

## License & attribution

The **sample** is shared under **CC-BY-NC-4.0** (attribution, non-commercial). The **full commercial dataset** is licensed separately via [roasterdb.net](https://specialty-coffee-roasterdb.pages.dev). Are you a roaster and want a record corrected or removed? Email RoasterDB@proton.me.

**Full dataset & updates:** https://specialty-coffee-roasterdb.pages.dev

resources.description: 100 verified-tier specialty-coffee products across 72 roasters. One row per coffee product listing, with origin, process, roast, pricing, SCA flavor mapping, and full provenance.

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: Roaster's Shopify product ID (identifier for the listing).

fields.name: source_roaster
fields.description: Roaster brand name.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Coffee / product name exactly as listed on the storefront.

fields.name: origin_country
fields.description: Producing country, where stated or inferred (58% populated in full dataset).

fields.name: origin_region
fields.description: Producing region within the country, where stated (20% populated).

fields.name: altitude_min_meters
fields.description: Minimum growing elevation in metres above sea level, where stated (17% populated).

fields.name: altitude_max_meters
fields.description: Maximum growing elevation in metres above sea level, where stated (17% populated).

fields.name: process_method
fields.description: Post-harvest processing: Washed, Natural, Honey, Anaerobic, or Other (Other when not stated).

fields.name: roast_level
fields.description: Roast level: Light, Medium, Dark (and split levels), or Unknown where not stated (32% specific).

fields.name: varietals
fields.description: Comma-separated coffee varietals, e.g. 'Gesha, SL28' (30% populated).

fields.name: weight_grams
fields.description: Net weight of the listed unit, in grams.

fields.name: price_currency
fields.description: ISO currency code of the price (typically USD).

fields.name: price_value
fields.description: Retail price, sanitized to a plausible band ($3-$150). 88% populated.

fields.name: tasting_notes_sca_nodes
fields.description: '; '-separated SCA Flavor Wheel paths, e.g. 'Fruity > Berry > Blueberry'. Normalized from free-text tasting notes.

fields.name: tasting_notes_confidence
fields.description: Confidence (0-1) of the flavor-note normalization.

fields.name: quality_flag
fields.description: 'good' = verified tier (origin + sanitized price + SCA mapping, QA-passed); 'questionable' otherwise.

fields.name: source_platform
fields.description: Source channel the record was extracted from (shopify).

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Exact product page URL the record was extracted from (re-verifiable provenance).

fields.name: retrieved_at
fields.description: Crawl timestamp — when the fact was true.

fields.name: dataset_version
fields.description: Snapshot identifier, e.g. 2026.07.
